sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70019" key="nehla/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νε-ηλάτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ναῦς</etym>) <sense id="n70019.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rower,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
